allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('zod' in deps, deps.get\('zod','NOT FOUND'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const d = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('zod:', d.zod || 'NOT FOUND'\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('zod version:', z.ZodVersion || z.version || 'unknown'\)")
